session.user:
Run these checks and report results. Do NOT fix anything — just report:
1. ruff check src/erk/core/codespace_run.py 2. ruff format --check src/erk/core/codespace_run.py 3. pytest tests/unit/cli/test_config_codespace.py tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_resolve.py tests/unit/core/codespace/test_codespace_run.py tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_connect_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/run/objective/test_plan_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/test_config_docs_path.py -v
session.assistant: I'll run these checks for you. Let me execute all three commands.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on all specified test files

session.tool_result:

============================== 56 passed in 0.81s ==============================
session.assistant:
Perfect! All checks passed. Here are the results:
## Check Results
**1. ruff check src/erk/core/codespace_run.py** - Status: PASSED - All checks passed!
**2. ruff format --check src/erk/core/codespace_run.py** - Status: PASSED - File already formatted correctly
**3. pytest (56 tests across 6 test files)** - Status: PASSED - 56 passed in 0.81s - Test breakdown: - `test_config_codespace.py`: 11 passed - `test_resolve.py`: 9 passed - `test_codespace_run.py`: 7 passed - `test_connect_cmd.py`: 13 passed - `test_plan_cmd.py`: 8 passed - `test_config_docs_path.py`: 8 passed
All linting, formatting, and tests are passing successfully.
